'''鈭歵h-ch-n''' ('''kathachan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dagger|dagger]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dagger|dagger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-ch-n
|-
! Lemma
| kathachan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithachan|thithachan]] || [[word:jithachan|jithachan]] || [[word:shithachan|shithachan]] || [[word:kithachan|kithachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthachan|thuthuthachan]] || [[word:jujuthachan|jujuthachan]] || [[word:shushuthachan|shushuthachan]] || [[word:kukuthachan|kukuthachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthachan|thuthachan]] || [[word:juthachan|juthachan]] || [[word:shuthachan|shuthachan]] || [[word:kuthachan|kuthachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthachan|thuthachan]] || [[word:juthachan|juthachan]] || [[word:shuthachan|shuthachan]] || [[word:kuthachan|kuthachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethachan|thethachan]] || [[word:jethachan|jethachan]] || [[word:shethachan|shethachan]] || [[word:kethachan|kethachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothachan|thothothachan]] || [[word:jojothachan|jojothachan]] || [[word:shoshothachan|shoshothachan]] || [[word:kokothachan|kokothachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothachan|thothachan]] || [[word:jothachan|jothachan]] || [[word:shothachan|shothachan]] || [[word:kothachan|kothachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothachan|thothachan]] || [[word:jothachan|jothachan]] || [[word:shothachan|shothachan]] || [[word:kothachan|kothachan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]] || [[word:thachan|thachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thachan|th忙thachan]] || [[word:j忙thachan|j忙thachan]] || [[word:sh忙thachan|sh忙thachan]] || [[word:k忙thachan|k忙thachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathachan|thathathachan]] || [[word:jajathachan|jajathachan]] || [[word:shashathachan|shashathachan]] || [[word:kakathachan|kakathachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathachan|thathachan]] || [[word:jathachan|jathachan]] || [[word:shathachan|shathachan]] || [[word:kathachan|kathachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathachan|thathachan]] || [[word:jathachan|jathachan]] || [[word:shathachan|shathachan]] || [[word:kathachan|kathachan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathachan|shathachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathachan|goshathachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathachan|gokishathachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathachann眉|shathachann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathachannkn眉|goshathachannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathachann眉|gokishathachann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathachansh毛|shathachansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathachannksh毛|goshathachannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathachansh毛|gokishathachansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathachanro|shathachanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathachannkro|goshathachannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathachanro|gokishathachanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathachanmu|shathachanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathachannkmu|goshathachannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathachanmu|gokishathachanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathachansher|shathachansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathachannksher|goshathachannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathachansher|gokishathachansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathachanng|shathachanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathachannkng|goshathachannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathachanng|gokishathachanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathachanya|shathachanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathachannkya|goshathachannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathachanya|gokishathachanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathachanyam|shathachanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathachannkyam|goshathachannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathachanyam|gokishathachanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathachann眉sh毛|shathachann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathachannkn眉sh毛|goshathachannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathachann眉sh毛|gokishathachann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathachann眉ro|shathachann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathachannkn眉ro|goshathachannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathachann眉ro|gokishathachann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathachann眉mu|shathachann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathachannkn眉mu|goshathachannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathachann眉mu|gokishathachann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathachansh毛n眉|shathachansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathachannksh毛n眉|goshathachannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathachansh毛n眉|gokishathachansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathachansh毛ro|shathachansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathachannksh毛ro|goshathachannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathachansh毛ro|gokishathachansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathachansh毛mu|shathachansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathachannksh毛mu|goshathachannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathachansh毛mu|gokishathachansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathachanron眉|shathachanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathachannkron眉|goshathachannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathachanron眉|gokishathachanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathachanrosh毛|shathachanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathachannkrosh毛|goshathachannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathachanrosh毛|gokishathachanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathachanromu|shathachanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathachannkromu|goshathachannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathachanromu|gokishathachanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathachanmun眉|shathachanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathachannkmun眉|goshathachannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathachanmun眉|gokishathachanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathachanmush毛|shathachanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathachannkmush毛|goshathachannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathachanmush毛|gokishathachanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathachanmuro|shathachanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathachannkmuro|goshathachannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathachanmuro|gokishathachanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|17228b0}}
